# PERF-047 positive: strings.Split called per iteration of a loop
lang: go
file: PERF-047-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "strings"

func SplitAll(rows []string) [][]string {
	var out [][]string
	for _, r := range rows {
		parts := strings.Split(r, ",")
		out = append(out, parts)
	}
	return out
}
